texto: I have prayed in her fields of poppies I have laughed with the men who died - But in all my ways and through all my days Like a friend He walked beside. I have seen a sight under Heaven That only God understands In the battle's glare I have seen Christ there With the Sword of God in His hand.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gordon Johnstone: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I have prayed in her fields of poppies I have laughed with the men who died - But in all my ways …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, war, prayed pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e reflexao.
